_doc: Phase-84 progressive tightening state. The 5-min cron loop reads this, evaluates the latest GitHub Actions run, and tightens STRATEGY_VARIANT when thresholds are met. STAGES go from MOST OPEN to MOST RESTRICTIVE.

force.description: Phase-79: bypass pattern detector entirely, every 1-min bar fires synthetic BUY, 5%/12% bracket. Goal: validate execution path.

ultra.description: Phase-72: ultra-loose entry thresholds (pole_min_move 1%, no vetos). Still uses real pattern detector but VERY permissive.

loose.description: Phase-69: pole_min_move 2.5%, VWAP/MACD vetos active, 2x position sizing.

strict.description: Cameron-original (terminal stage). Most restrictive, highest edge per trade.

_thresholds_explained: From force to ultra: need >=2 clean trades AND stage trade count >=20. Once both hit, advance. Same pattern through stages. min_trades_to_advance prevents premature jump when only 1-2 trades fired by chance. trades_at_this_stage is the cumulative count needed for transition.
